conversation.text: So, Jake, what do you do?
I'm a graphic designer. I work for a small marketing firm in town.

translations.Somali: Waxaan ahay naqshadeeye garaafik. Waxaan ka shaqeeyaa shirkad yar oo suuqgeyn ah oo magaalada ku taal.

conversation.text: That sounds creative and fun. Did your parents influence your career choice?

translations.Somali: Taas waxay umuuqataa mid hal abuur leh oo xiiso leh. Waalidiintaadu miyaay saameeyeen doorashadaada xirfadeed?

conversation.text: Not directly. My mom is a doctor and my dad is an engineer. They always encouraged me to follow my own path, though.

translations.Somali: Maya si toos ah uma aysan sameyn. Hooyaday waa dhakhtar, aabahayna waa injineer. Had iyo jeer way igu dhiirigeliyeen inaan jidkayga raaco.

conversation.text: Wow, a doctor and an engineer? That's impressive. Do you ever feel pressured to go into a similar field?

translations.Somali: Subxaanallah, dhakhtar iyo injineer? Taasi waa wax cajiib ah. Ma dareentaa mararka qaar cadaadis kugu saabsan inaad gasho meel la mid ah?

conversation.text: Sometimes, but they were always supportive of my interests. They just wanted me to be happy and passionate about whatever I chose to do.

translations.Somali: Mararka qaar, laakiin had iyo jeer way iga taageeri jireen danaha aan leeyahay. Waxay kaliya doonayeen inaan noqdo mid faraxsan oo xamaasad leh wax walba oo aan doorto inaan sameeyo.
